response.justification: While the candidate meets the educational requirement (BS in CS + 14 years of experience) and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, there is a critical skill gap. The role requires specialized expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and deep learning workload optimization for AI accelerators. The candidate's career is predominantly in application-level software (web, mobile, backend services) with limited hardware-level experience. Current AI-agent infrastructure work appears to be MCP framework development rather than hardware optimization. The domain expertise required is fundamentally misaligned with the candidate's background.
strengths: Meets educational qualification (BS + 14+ years professional experience) with proven ability to learn new domains
Demonstrates performance optimization mindset through low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby and pricing optimization at Optilyz
Experienced working across full stack including embedded systems and infrastructure (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD)
concerns: No experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture design, or ASIC development required for core responsibilities
Lacks deep learning workload optimization expertise; current AI work focuses on frameworks (MCP) not accelerator performance analysis
Career trajectory is application software focused; insufficient evidence of hardware-software co-design or GPU/TPU architecture analysis
